diagrams.title: Frame Buffer Organization
diagrams.description: Shows how pixel data is organized in memory matching screen layout
elements: Row 0 stored first, then Row 1, etc.
diagrams.purpose: Understand memory layout and pixel addressing in frame buffers

diagrams.title: Double Buffering Mechanism
diagrams.description: Illustration of front and back buffer swapping during rendering
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how double buffering prevents screen flicker

diagrams.title: Z-Buffer Depth Test
diagrams.description: Shows depth comparison for hidden surface removal
diagrams.purpose: Understand depth testing and visibility determination in 3D rendering

visuals.title: Setting Frame Buffer Values
visuals.description: Visual diagram for setting frame buffer values
